benefits: Enables residents to live well, independently and safely in their homes. Supports proactive and preventative care through monitoring daily routines and detecting unusual changes. Provides timely support and prevents crises such as falls. Delivers financial benefits to the Council.
source_note: AI-powered care system for independent living, proactive care, and fall prevention in London Borough of Sutton.

benefits: 30% reduction in missed appointments, £27.5 million estimated annual savings for Mid and South Essex NHS Foundation Trust, 377 DNAs prevented and 1,910 additional patients seen during 6-month pilot
source_note: AI software predicts likely missed appointments using algorithms and anonymized data to arrange convenient appointment times.

ai_method: Machine Learning, Natural Language Processing, Computer Vision
benefits: Accelerate the testing and evaluation of AI in the NHS to benefit patients with faster and more personalised diagnosis and greater efficiency in screening services.
owning_team: Department of Health and Social Care
source_note:
£36 million boost for AI technologies in NHS care, 38 new AI projects across various healthcare applications
.
tool_name: NHS AI Lab AI in Health and Care Award

benefits: Detects drivers using mobile phones and not wearing seatbelts to improve road safety and reduce accidents
source_note: Trial ends March 2025. Uses AI to analyze images of passing motorists for mobile phone use and seatbelt violations.
tool_name: Mobile Phone and Seatbelt Detection Trial

benefits: Increases transparency and public confidence in AI use, provides best practices, ensures ethical and responsible AI adoption
source_note: Scotland is becoming the first part of the UK to make public sector AI use registration mandatory.

benefits: Automates mapping of peatland surface features across England's uplands using AI, providing comprehensive and repeatable monitoring of peatland damage and restoration. Saves time and resources compared to manual mapping methods.
source_note: AI4Peat project for mapping peatland features using AI. Outputs to be published as part of England Peat Map in spring 2025.
